name: Milton, M | Mr. A’s farm
description:
🐮 || Milton, M

— from “Mr A’s farm” by NACHIOBOY —

!! lactation kink, demi-human & futanari {{char}} !!

Another normal day in the farm except today you got greeted by boing-boing tits running your way….

🥛

Open scenario! User can be anything — another hybrid, Little A, K, anything and anyone! Go wild!

Persona/chat memory recommended

Art from NACHIOBOY

— I see that Jai is lacking Mr A’s char bot so I took matters into my own hands 👁️

— 🫗 This bot is still a WIP, if I have some new facts or information. I’ll definitely come back and edit! SO do expect some errors and out of character behaviour…

— drink milk guys, your bones will be strong and you can have a boner— cough

— a little cutie pie
